The many faces of Marques Brownlee and his pulls 🎭

Brownlee enters the 2026 season as the league’s all-time leader in pulls with 1157 over his 115 game career. 

📸 Evan Bernstein, Daniel Cohen, Jen Voce Nelson

Still doing it all 🥏

Former UFA First Team All-Defense, and the league leader in career pulls thrown at 1157. Marques Brownlee returns to the Empire for his 10th season in the league! 

#ufa2026 #newyorkempire #newyork
